untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental supply/demand analysis and detection of 'structural inflection points' and 'material thesis weakening' — these are qualitative, forward-looking judgments not encodable as price/volume/technical indicators. The 8-12% move from inflection point and '30% of estimated multi-year move duration' also require external regime knowledge unavailable in backtester. Proxy rules substituted (100-MA crossover + volume confirmation) but do not capture Schwager's core thesis of fundamental structural imbalance vs. crowd momentum.
translation_notes: Entry/exit approximated using 100-period MA (structural level proxy) and volume ratio confirmation. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original. Hold period (1825 days ≈ 5 years) and stop loss (8%) derived from parameters. Signal fundamentally requires discretionary fundamental analysis that cannot be fully automated.
